description: Style NoteAdopt a winning attitude with this T-shirt from puma. The stylish graphic print gives this tee a stunning look and the soft cotton fabric gives you exemplary comfort all day long. Pair this with jeans and casual shoes Product DetailsGreen t-shirt with a round ribbed neck, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, printed branding on the front and brand tab appliqued on the left hem Material and Care100% cottonWash separately in cool waterDo not use bleach or dry cleanWarm iron; Do not iron on decorations Size and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
